items.name: Heart-Disease-Survival-Prediction-Framework
items.description: Heart Disease Survival Prediction Framework is a machine learning project that predicts short-term heart failure risk using clinical data. It combines IPCW (Inverse Probability of Censoring Weighting) with LightGBM to handle censored survival data and improve prediction reliability, achieving an AUC of about 0.80 for 90-day risk prediction.

items.name: danial-rosli-portfolio
items.description: Software Engineer specializing in Machine Learning and DevOps methodology. Focused on developing predictive models and proactive development frameworks to solve real-world problems.

items.name: financial-forecasting-a
items.description: Developed a comparative framework evaluating five time-series and machine learning models for stock market forecasting. The best-performing model was identified through error metric analysis and subsequently hybridized with machine learning models to capture both linear and non-linear patterns in financial data. Designed a dashboard for the results

items.name: Secure-and-Interpretable-Credit-Scoring-with-Federated-AI

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: NANOMATERIAL-CLASSIFICATION-RESEARCH
items.description: Nanomaterial Classification Research Framework (NCRF) is an open-source Python platform for physics-based analysis and machine learning classification of low-dimensional nanomaterials. The framework bridges quantum mechanical modeling with statistical data science to enable quantitative structure-property relationship studies across 0D, 1D, 2D, 3D.

It extracts per-vulnerability features and uses machine learning models to predict severity and confidence, generating a structured, developer-friendly security report.

items.description: Machine Learning–based intelligent test selection framework for CI/CD pipelines. Uses commit history, test execution data, and ML models to predict and run only relevant tests to accelerate regression cycles.

items.description: A Machine Learning framework using CatBoost to forecast branch × product level sales and margin outcomes. items.name: Probabilistic-bitcoin-with-ML-
items.description: A Python-based framework designed to quantify risk in Bitcoin trading using Probabilistic Machine Learning. Most ML models fail in crypto because they ignore oratorical uncertainty (the inherent randomness of the market). This repo provides tools to build models that don't just predict the next move

items.name: tradingsystem
items.description: Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

items.name: Edge-Continual-Learning-for-Machine-Signal-Monitoring
items.description: Edge-Cloud Continual Learning is a hybrid TinyML framework that allows embedded devices to detect unknown machine signals and trigger cloud-based retraining. By using Replay Memory and Exemplar Datasets, the system evolves to recognize new machine types over time without losing its ability to monitor previous ones.

items.name: David-ML-Scanner-V2
items.description: David-ML is a sophisticated machine learning framework designed for quantitative traders and financial analysts seeking to build, test, and deploy advanced trading strategies. Built entirely in Python, this project combines cutting-edge ML algorithms with comprehensive backtesting capabilities and real-time decision-making systems.

items.name: AP
items.description: Real-time adaptive infrastructure adjusts load balancing and auto-scaling via machine learning-driven decision-making, delivering intelligent distributed systems framework.
